repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
contents_tesim: Books of Isaiah, Hosea, Joel, Amos, Obadiah, Jonas, Micah, Nahum, Habakkuk, Zephaniah, Haggai, Zechariah. Malachi, Jeremiah, the Lamentations of Jeremiah, Ezekiel and Daniel. Also story of Susanna, according to the Septuagint.
full_text_tesim: Books of Isaiah, Hosea, Joel, Amos, Obadiah, Jonas, Micah, Nahum, Habakkuk, Zephaniah, Haggai, Zechariah. Malachi, Jeremiah, the Lamentations of Jeremiah, Ezekiel and Daniel. Also story of Susanna, according to the Septuagint.
Decoration on Back Board Inside, triangle with radiating lines
Headpiece on f. 343v, intertwined vines with thorns, elevated cross | Decorative border on f. 343v; partial border on ff. 344r-347r
